candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: There are three common isotopes of naturally occurring magnesium as indicated in the table below. Using the information above, calculate the average atomic mass of magnesium. Write your answer number only, in the unit of amu.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
如下表所示,有三个自然发生的常见镁同位素及其相对原子质量和丰度。$\begin{array}{c|c|c}
\text{同位素} & \text{相对原子质量} & \text{丰度 (\%)}\\
\hline
^{24}\mathrm{Mg} & 23.98 & 78.99\\
^{25}\mathrm{Mg} & 24.99 & 10.00\\
^{26}\mathrm{Mg} & 25.98 & 11.01
\end{array}$使用上述信息,计算镁的平均原子质量,答案仅写下数值,单位为 AMU。
